\tzpentry{ID3978}{Greens Function Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3978 introduces Greens Function Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\n\\mathcal{G}(t) := \\sum_f \\left[ \\frac{d^2 \\psi_f}{dt^2} \\cdot \\vec{n}_f \\right] + \\Delta T_{g}^{(f)} \\cdot \\omega_f\n\\]
